findings.finding: The workspace delivery context and exact-commit repair evidence identify local HEAD as 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36; a live repository comparison confirms remote bos/issue-51 is identical to that SHA with zero commits ahead or behind.

The poll path now reconciles capacity_waiting entries; missing, terminal, inactive, and unroutable waiters invoke the game-api release path and remove local claim, queue, and repository reservation state only after provider release succeeds.

Regression coverage proves releasing a missing waiter makes a later Issue in the same repository dispatchable, while provider release failure retains the local reservation and preserves repository serialization.

Valid same-run waiters are refreshed and heartbeated without changing queue Attempt 3 or retry-attempt state; foreign-owned refreshed claims drop only stale local state and do not mutate the remote owner.

Exact-commit evidence reports 363 tests with 0 failures, 100.00% coverage, strict Credo/spec checks, Dialyzer, formatting, and diff hygiene all passing; the complete 8-file patch was independently inspected in the prior repair cycle and remains the same exact commit.
Exact merged-artifact installation and service-health verification are post-merge delivery responsibilities and are not required to affirm this pre-merge functional review.

summary: Passed functional review for exact commit 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36: stale capacity-waiting claims are safely reconciled and released, valid claims remain recoverable without Attempt or retry consumption, same-repository work is unblocked, and exact-commit validation is affirmative.
